title: Fix final release preflight tree identity and close the Conditional GO plan
outOfScope: Any adopter project or installed runtime repository
Changing enterprise security or compliance claims
Deleting immutable prior Work Item evidence or referenced review material

sources.reason: Fail-closed release preflight currently compares a Git tree that includes its own freeze marker.
Regression coverage for normalized source-tree identity.
Provider workflow invokes the release preflight before expensive evidence generation.
Final plan cleanup and historical audit map.

rawUserRequest: 修复最终 release preflight 的 sourceTree 自引用缺陷，完成 Conditional GO 计划最终历史化、绑定发布元数据、完整 PR/合并/关闭/清理生命周期，并独立验证模板仓库发布；不得修改安装对象工程。

declaredIntent.summary: Make final release preflight source identity non-self-referential, then close the template-only plan and publish source-bound release evidence.

riskAssessment.reason: A prior finalization attempt proved that full-tree sourceTree binding is self-referential; the normalized identity must be tested before release metadata is frozen.

executionDecision.reason: User authorization covers process hardening, final plan cleanup, release binding, PR, merge, closure, and template-only verification.

preReviewWarnings: Verify normalized source-tree semantics, deterministic archive digest, exact budget reservation, and template/adopter boundary.

checkpointPolicy.reason: Record at least one checkpoint before finishing to reduce mid-task drift.

acceptance: Release preflight compares a specified normalized source-tree identity that excludes self-referential release metadata, with regression tests proving a frozen candidate can be validated after the marker is committed.
The final plan is historical with an audit map, release metadata and freeze marker match the final default-branch deterministic archive, and no adopter project is changed.

Before completion, `make ai-finish`, one PR, provider merge, `make ai-close-work-item`, branch cleanup, default-branch equality, release workflow success, tag existence, downloaded asset SHA256 equality, and clean-checkout verification are each recorded as separate evidence.
guidelines: Keep template release evidence separate from adopter runtime state.
Do not delete immutable prior Work Item evidence or referenced review material.

intent.problem: The existing sourceTree check hashes the complete Git tree even though release-freeze.json contains the sourceTree value, making a valid frozen release self-referential and practically impossible.
constraints: Reserve exactly one archive record before finish.
Freeze only after this Work Item is archived and no active Work Item remains.
Only the template repository is in scope.
intent.rationale: A normalized identity allows the committed freeze marker to be source-bound without circular hashing while preserving fail-closed release checks.

scenarioCoverage.scenario: Preflight code and tests exist before the fix
Only template repository paths are in scope
Archive budget has one bounded reserved record

restrictedWriteApproval.reason: The user explicitly authorized final template release, governance budget, plan cleanup, PR, merge, and lifecycle closure.

rollbackNote: Revert this Work Item diff and restore related tests and docs.
